subject: Fw:
body:
Should I book Flight Options for Jack on Thurs morning?

------Original Message------
From: Jack Goldberger
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Sent: Feb 18, 2008 10:29 AM
Subject: RE:


Sara.
Spoke to Jeffrey.  Thursday is fine.  Can we do real early.  Wheels up
6am at pbi?
